name: Pedro Pacho
notes: Born c. 1500 in Fregenal de la Sierra, Badajoz, Reinos de Castilla (Spain). Died before 1547 in Nueva España. Marked *judeoconverso* (Jewish converso) in the Lisbon Sephardic certificate. Earliest known ancestor in this lineage.

name: Mariana Temiño de Velasco
notes: Born c. 1510 in Sevilla, Andalucía, Reinos de Castilla (Spain). Wife of Pedro Pacho.

name: Mariana Temiño de Velasco
notes: Born 20 Aug 1543 in Ciudad de México, Nueva España. Daughter of Pedro Pacho and Mariana Temiño de Velasco (1510). Wife of Lorenzo de Padilla Dávila.

name: Lorenzo de Padilla Dávila
notes: Born c. 1520 in Jerez de la Frontera, Reinos de Castilla (Spain). Husband of Mariana Temiño de Velasco (1543).

name: Diego de Padilla Dávila
notes: Born c. 1560 in Guadalajara, Nueva Galicia. Died 11 Jun 1631 in Guadalajara, Nueva Galicia. Son of Lorenzo de Padilla Dávila and Mariana Temiño de Velasco (1543).

name: María Ana de la Mota y Vera
notes: Born c. 1560 in Guadalajara, Nueva Galicia. Wife of Diego de Padilla Dávila.

name: Lorenzo de Padilla Dávila / de la Mota Padilla
notes: Born c. 1598 in Guadalajara, Nueva Galicia. Died 3 Dec 1648 in Guadalajara, Nueva Galicia. Son of Diego de Padilla Dávila and María Ana de la Mota y Vera.

name: Josefa Arias de Valdés
notes: Born c. 1610 in Nueva Galicia. Wife of Lorenzo de Padilla Dávila.

name: Cristóbal de Padilla Dávila
notes: Born 23 Apr 1640 in Guadalajara, Nueva Galicia. Son of Lorenzo de Padilla Dávila and Josefa Arias de Valdés.

name: Luisa Gutiérrez de Hermosillo
notes: Born c. 1645 in Jalostotitlán, Nueva Galicia. Wife of Cristóbal de Padilla Dávila.

name: Francisco de Padilla
notes: Born c. 1672 in Jalostotitlán, Nueva Galicia. Died 6 Nov 1738 in San Juan de los Lagos, Nueva Galicia. Son of Cristóbal de Padilla Dávila and Luisa Gutiérrez de Hermosillo.

name: Ana Muñoz de la Barba
notes: Born c. 1680 in Nueva Galicia. Wife of Francisco de Padilla.

name: Cristóbal de Padilla
notes: Born 15 Apr 1704 in Jalostotitlán, Nueva Galicia. Died 5 Sep 1784 in San Juan de los Lagos, Nueva Galicia. Son of Francisco de Padilla and Ana Muñoz de la Barba.

name: María Águeda Martín del Campo
notes: Born c. 1705 in San Juan de los Lagos, Nueva Galicia. Wife of Cristóbal de Padilla.

name: Juan Leonardo Padilla
notes: Born 29 Nov 1739 in San Juan de los Lagos, Nueva Galicia. Son of Cristóbal de Padilla and María Águeda Martín del Campo.

name: Rosalía Pérez
notes: Born 11 Mar 1739 in Jalostotitlán, Nueva Galicia. Wife of Juan Leonardo Padilla.

name: José Domingo Padilla
notes: Born 16 Aug 1772 in Jalostotitlán, Nueva Galicia. Son of Juan Leonardo Padilla and Rosalía Pérez.

name: María Juliana Covarrubias
notes: Born 25 Mar 1778 in Jalostotitlán, Nueva Galicia. Wife of José Domingo Padilla.

name: Juan José Padilla
notes: Born c. 1794 in Tepatitlán, Nueva Galicia. Son of José Domingo Padilla and María Juliana Covarrubias.

name: Gertrudis González
notes: Born 8 Jul 1798 in Tepatitlán, Nueva Galicia. Wife of Juan José Padilla.

name: Victoriano Padilla González
notes: Born 11 Sep 1822 in Tepatitlán, Nueva Galicia, Imperio Mexicano. Son of Juan José Padilla and Gertrudis González.

name: María de Jesús Aceves Ramírez
notes: Born c. 1834 in Tepatitlán, Jalisco, México. Wife of Victoriano Padilla González.

name: Felicitas Padilla Aceves
notes: Born 15 Jul 1860 in Tepatitlán, Jalisco, México. Married 18 May 1881 in Tepatitlán. Mother of Esteban González Padilla.

name: José Inés González Ramírez
notes: Born c. 1860 in Tepatitlán, Jalisco, México. Husband of Felicitas Padilla Aceves. Father of Esteban González Padilla.

name: Esteban González Padilla
notes: Born 26 Dec 1895 in Tepatitlán de Morelos, Jalisco, México. Died 9 Sep 1970 in Distrito Federal, México. Founded Fábrica de Jabón La Corona in 1920 with brothers Loreto and Daniel. Married María Isabel Mendoza Pardo 5 Jul 1918 in Guadalajara.

name: María Isabel Mendoza Pardo
notes: Born 10 Apr 1896 in Tingüindín, Michoacán, México. Married Esteban González Padilla 5 Jul 1918 in Guadalajara.

name: Antonio Eduardo González Mendoza
notes: Born 19 Apr 1919 in Torreón, Coahuila, México. Died 7 Mar 2002 in Miguel Hidalgo, Distrito Federal, México. Married Rosa Ortiz Luna 19 Jul 1940 in Zamora, Michoacán. Son of Esteban González Padilla and María Isabel Mendoza Pardo. Father of Rosa Martha González.

name: Rosa Ortiz Luna
notes: Born 3 Sep 1919 in Zamora, Michoacán, México. Wife of Antonio Eduardo González Mendoza. Mother of Rosa Martha González.

name: Rosa Martha González Ortiz
notes: Born 4 Jul 1941 in Distrito Federal, México. Married Sostenes Gustavo Melgarejo 13 Jun 1963 in Distrito Federal. Daughter of Antonio Eduardo González Mendoza and Rosa Ortiz Luna. Mother of Lusana Marina Melgarejo González.

name: Sostenes Gustavo Melgarejo
notes: Born 7 Oct 1940 in Distrito Federal, México. Husband of Rosa Martha González Ortiz. Father of Lusana Marina Melgarejo González. The Melgarejo line beyond Sostenes is not traced in the Lisbon certificate.

name: Lusana Marina Melgarejo González
notes: Born 18 Jul 1968 in Distrito Federal, México. Daughter of Rosa Martha González Ortiz and Sostenes Gustavo Melgarejo. Mother of Daniel Martínez del Campo Melgarejo. Certificate 111852/07-2022 from Comunidade Israelita de Lisboa certifies her as a descendant of Sephardic Jews of Portuguese origin through the Padilla / Temiño de Velasco / Pacho line.

name: Daniel Martínez del Campo Melgarejo
notes: Son of Lusana Marina Melgarejo González. Built this family tree app.
